description: TEST_ENV can only be used by one test session at a time
STAGING_ENV can only be used by one deployment at a time
New service must be registered before old code is decommissioned
Service dependency ordering: if B depends on A, A must be deployed first
Code review must pass before deployment
Staging tests must pass before production deployment
REVIEWER approves or requests changes for each microservice
Deployment succeeds or fails, triggering rollback notification on failure
Extract service -> review -> test in TEST_ENV -> deploy in STAGING_ENV -> register (per service pipeline)
Microservice dependency ordering must be respected across the three services
TESTER needs TEST_ENV for validation; only one test session at a time
DEVOPS needs STAGING_ENV for each service deployment; only one deployment at a time
Hold-and-wait: TESTER holds TEST_ENV waiting for deployment results while DEVOPS holds STAGING_ENV waiting for test results
Rollback cycle: failed deployment triggers rollback, requiring re-entry into review -> test -> deploy, potentially blocking other services indefinitely
